meta.title: AI Operation
meta.subtitle: SKADA/SCADA command-center monitoring, biotech batch control, and agentic execution via Telegram/WhatsApp.

alerts.issue: Gas pressure fluctuating (+/- 8%) at Plant B; output risk ~3% in next 2-3 hours.
alerts.recommendedAction: Adjust gas feed pressure and inspect valve section B immediately.
Run combustion tuning sequence and verify feedstock consistency.

alerts.issue: Dissolved oxygen trend is below recipe curve in Reactor F-12.
alerts.recommendedAction: Increase aeration by 5% and trigger nutrient dosing step per batch recipe.

aiInsights.title: Plant status risk in next 3 hours
aiInsights.insight: Gas pressure variance (+/- 8%) is the strongest predictor of short-term output drop.
aiInsights.recommendedAction: Approve immediate valve section B inspection and gas feed pressure adjustment.

aiInsights.title: Efficiency recovery opportunity
aiInsights.insight: Returning efficiency from 91% to 94% baseline can recover estimated RM15K daily value.
aiInsights.recommendedAction: Run combustion tuning and verify feedstock consistency within current shift.

aiInsights.title: Biotech batch protection
aiInsights.insight: Reactor F-12 dissolved oxygen drift may reduce yield if not corrected before next nutrient phase.
aiInsights.recommendedAction: Increase aeration 5%, apply recipe correction, and log e-signature for compliance.

workflows.name: SKADA status workflow
workflows.automation: Pull SCADA tags, analyze risk, return current status + recommendation + approval prompt

workflows.name: Agentic operator dispatch workflow
workflows.automation: Send execution email to operator, request job status and photo proof, track response

workflows.name: Biotech compliance workflow
workflows.automation: Apply validated recipe correction, log e-signature, archive audit trail for compliance

executionQueue.task: Generate live SKADA plant status report for CEO request
Dispatch valve section B instruction to plant operator
Validate biotech CIP/SIP completion log for Batch BT-442

slaBreaches.impact: Valve section B inspection proof pending

completionFeed.task: SKADA status insight sent: output 4.2 MW, efficiency 91%, availability 98%
Operator email sent: adjust gas pressure and inspect valve section B
Biotech alert handled: DO correction applied with audit signature
